overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person walk through a futuristic dystopian city. The clip transitions from an indoor medical facility to a waterfront promenade with views of the iconic '07' tower, crosses an open urban plaza, and continues through a semi-covered corridor beneath an elevated highway structure. The environment features high-tech architecture mixed with urban decay under bright natural sunlight.

events.description: approaching glass exit doors to leave the building

agents.ego_description: walking through a medical facility corridor toward the exit doors

entered.detail: white medical supply carts with wheels positioned in the corridor
white structural columns supporting the ceiling grid
white drop ceiling with fluorescent lighting panels
large glass doors with metal frames leading outside
green illuminated exit sign above the glass doors

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a sterile medical facility with white walls, ceiling tiles, and medical carts. The camera moves forward through a corridor toward glass exit doors, with support pillars visible on the left. The environment is artificially lit and completely enclosed with no other people present.

events.description: exits the building onto a covered waterfront walkway
passes by a seated NPC on a bench to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade, observing the futuristic city skyline and the prominent tower_07

notable_agents.action: sitting on a yellow bench facing the waterfront, wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: blue metal railing separating the walkway from the water and parking area below
massive futuristic skyscraper with '07' prominently displayed on its facade
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with neon signage
large colorful advertisement poster on the building wall showing figures in green
yellow and green public bench with graffiti

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building, the scene transitions to a covered waterfront walkway with views of a futuristic cityscape. The iconic tower_07 dominates the skyline in the distance. The camera passes a seated NPC on a bench and continues along the concrete walkway, with a blue railing separating the path from a lower parking area. The area is sheltered by an overhead structure while remaining open to the bright daylight.

events.description: moves from covered walkway into open plaza with full sky exposure
crosses the street toward the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the open asphalt plaza and street, navigating toward the elevated highway underpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking across the street in front of the camera

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated transit line with green structural elements
small yellow and gray guard station with windows
tall poles with distinctive orange Y-shaped light fixtures
various futuristic vehicles parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban plaza with full exposure to the bright midday sun. The camera crosses the asphalt surface toward a massive elevated highway structure that dominates the view ahead. A security booth and modern street lamps with orange fixtures are visible on the left, while parked cars line the right side. Pedestrians cross the open area, and the tower_07 remains visible shifting to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated transit structure

events.description: enters the covered corridor beneath the elevated highway tracks

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor beneath the elevated highway, passing under concrete pillars

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera from the opposite direction under the highway

entered.detail: massive concrete columns supporting the elevated highway above, with green structural beams
tall wild grass and vegetation growing through cracks in the concrete
metal security fencing running parallel to the walkway on the left side

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into a semi-covered corridor beneath the elevated highway, where massive concrete pillars create a rhythmic pattern overhead. The lighting becomes dappled and mixed as sunlight filters through the structure. Overgrown vegetation lines the concrete path, and a chain-link fence runs along the left. The tower_07 remains visible in the distance on the right, while pedestrians walk toward the camera from the far end of the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sterile indoor medical facility into a sprawling, sun-drenched dystopian cityscape. It begins within a white, artificially lit corridor filled with medical carts, moving forward toward glass exit doors. As the camera steps outside, the environment shifts to a covered waterfront walkway where the iconic tower_07 first appears on the horizon beyond a blue railing. The scene then opens into a wide, bright urban plaza, crossing asphalt past security booths and pedestrians toward a massive elevated highway structure. Finally, the camera moves beneath this highway into a semi-covered corridor, where the lighting becomes dappled under concrete pillars and overgrown vegetation lines the path.
